posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Progress Bar as a trigger in automations so that when it reaches 100% it can change a status.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like the progress bar to tigger a status change when it reaches 100% - either in automations or workflows (ideally automations).
I currently have a client with a series of 10 status columns that are checks performed on an item in random order.
As there are multiple “done” labels for some of them, the only work around is an obscene number of automations, so it’s just not feasible.
